title: What happened to the Evangelion 333 blu ray
display_title: What happened to the Evangelion 333 blu ray
wikitext:
[]: What happened to the Evangelion 3.33 blu-ray? Post by bladerj » Sat Jun 13, 2015 8:52 pm is it ever going to get release, was it canceled, transfered to another studio ? i ordered this like a year and half ago...,if i know this wasnt coming i would had bought the uk version

[]: Post by BlueBasilisk » Sat Jun 13, 2015 9:46 pm You can read more about it here: [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/7146/Official-Rebuild-Dub-Thread/[/url] But to sum up, Khara made them redo the dub with more oversight, and Funimation's twitters says they are "waiting for Evangelion 3.33 to be completed," whatever that means. They hope to have it out by winter, apparently.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Jun 13, 2015 10:34 pm It all comes tumbling down... tumbling down... tumbling down...

[]: Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat Jun 13, 2015 10:51 pm ^ And then they had to go and Rebuild it

[]: Post by bladerj » Sat Jun 13, 2015 11:04 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: You can read more about it here: [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/7146/Official-Rebuild-Dub-Thread/[/url] But to sum up, Khara made them redo the dub with more oversight, and Funimation's twitters says they are "waiting for Evangelion 3.33 to be completed," whatever that means. They hope to have it out by winter, apparently.

[]: Re: What happened to the blu ray ? Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jun 14, 2015 1:54 am bladerj wrote: i would had bought the uk version

[]: Post by TheFriskyIan » Sun Jun 14, 2015 10:29 pm Khara probably thought that having more presence in the US script would lessen confusion, and the wait is the result of them realizing that their movie is balls to the walls absurd no matter how many times you rewrite the script.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Jun 14, 2015 10:56 pm Funimation keeps claiming that they're working closely with the original filmmakers (Anno even?) in order to make the translation as accurate as possible, but Hideaki Anno is off preparing for a Godzilla movie that’ll be released next year and hopefully getting some Eva Shin pre-production done. Only Roger Corman can get these many things done that quickly.

[]: Post by AdmiralDerp » Fri Jun 19, 2015 7:29 pm Looks like Amazon(.ca) has pulled it from their site. SPOILER: Show

[]: Post by Guy Nacks » Fri Jun 19, 2015 8:54 pm I demand a documentary about the making of the English dub for 3.33. It'd probably be more entertaining than anything in Rebuild thus far.

[]: Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat Jun 20, 2015 2:53 am Anime Expo is coming up, and Funimation always has an industry panel. I'll let you guys know if they announce anything, assuming that they don't put it up on a public website at the same time.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jun 20, 2015 9:43 am MAYBE related, maybe not: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/17540/Eva-Anime-Expo-and-Bang-Zoom/

[]: Post by EvangelionGodMode » Sat Jun 20, 2015 8:49 pm Guy Nacks wrote: I demand a documentary about the making of the English dub for 3.33. It'd probably be more entertaining than anything in Rebuild thus far.

[]: Post by TonyTH » Sat Jun 20, 2015 11:46 pm I pre-ordered it when Evageeks first posted a listing on rightstuf.com as the first place you can pre-order Eva 3.33. I get emails every two weeks saying "We're working on it". I'm not sweating it, I paid it so long ago. But it's funny getting those emails every so often and laughing every time. Also I remember seeing Funi's original dub in January 2014. That is fucking crazy. This sucker has taken sooo long, it's unreal. But if it's for a better dub and 4.44 is so far out right now anyway, it doesn't hurt matters too much.

[]: Post by C.A.P. » Sun Jun 21, 2015 2:39 am I am an Evangelion fan. Bent on self-preservation.

[]: Post by Ray » Sun Jun 21, 2015 2:54 am Can someone at Funimation just slam the hammer down release the thing, and tell Anno to man up and deal with it? This is sheer lunacy. Pixar could animate and release a movie in the span of time it's taking to get this thing done.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sun Jun 21, 2015 7:59 am Ray wrote: tell Anno to man up and deal with it?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jun 21, 2015 8:02 am 3.33 English language release preview here .

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Jun 21, 2015 8:19 am Ray wrote: Can someone at Funimation just slam the hammer down release the thing, and tell Anno to man up and deal with it?

[]: Post by pwhodges » Sun Jun 21, 2015 8:24 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Yes, a company who care about nothing but profit [...]
